build.prompt:
'Done' + 1-line summary. Never print decision summary tables or multi-line output unless requested.
Use .ai/tmp/ for ALL temp files.
changed lines only, file:line refs. Never full files.
Scan ALL changes before first edit. One call per file.
Stage specific files. Never --no-verify.
Verify unfamiliar types/methods via web search or grep before using.
Web search current library version's docs before changing imports.
Stop if any not found.
